mapper.sql: SELECT w.warehouse_id, w.parent_id, w.ancestors, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.node_type, w.dept_id, d.dept_name, w.manager_id, u.nick_name as manager_name, w.address, w.area_type, w.location_type, w.capacity, w.location_status, w.status, w.del_flag, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.remark FROM wms_warehouse w LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON w.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON w.manager_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM wms_warehouse WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_warehouse SET del_flag = '2' WHERE warehouse_id IN #{warehouseId}
